Document:
# Rule A4: Respect the AHelp chat
The AHelp (F1) chat is for contacting admins. We are a small staff, so please be respectful and mindful that we may not always be able to respond right away. - Don't be afraid to AHelp! You won't get in trouble for using it in good faith, and in the worst case scenario you may not get any replies if we're busy. - Responding with hostility, refusing to respond, lying or intentionally disconnecting when an admin contacts you through the AHelp chat may result in swift punishment. - All AHelp messages are relayed to the Quantum Blue Discord server, meaning we can still see them even if no admin is currently in-game. Feel free to contact a game admin on discord if your issue isn't resolved in the same round.
